metadata.description: Cowork marketplace test: bootstrap and persistence probes plus one MCPB persistence experiment

plugins.name: sa-cowork-persist-probe
plugins.description: Minimal Cowork probe plugin that persists a value, reports its config, and can inspect an explicit bridge file exported by the persist extension

plugins.name: sa-cowork-bootstrap-probe
plugins.description: Self-contained Cowork bootstrap probe that installs its own bundled CLI into CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA
